title: "The Kind Of Man God Is Looking For" Jeremiah 5:1; Ezekiel 22:30

notes.introduction: An exposition of Jeremiah 5:1 and Ezekiel 22:30 on the attributes God seeks in a man, set against the backdrop of fatherlessness in America and the historical decline of Judah before the Babylonian captivity. Three characteristics drawn from both passages are examined: standing in the gap, executing judgment, and seeking truth.
